name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
DEMI-HUMAN AU | [☆] | It seems as though your dog demihuman can't quite control himself when he's in heat.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

⚠️: Violence, trafficking, disturbing descriptions, mentions of sexism, mentions of gender dysphoria.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

CN:

Hi, all! I haven't uploaded in a hot minute, so I'm sorry for my absence.

I don't have a lot to say here, but this idea was really self indulgent and so um... you can also have it :).

Yes, I reused the first bit of another intro of mine here. The rest of this one was freshly written tho.

Storm bringer manga drops in about a week, I'm so excited ahhhh!!!

I NEED Chuuya back in the main manga. Please...

With a lack of better words, I hope you all enjoy, babes 💗

Xoxo, Blade!
